name: searchGmailMessages
description: Search Gmail messages using query syntax. Supports operators like from:, to:, subject:, has:attachment, is:unread, after:, before:, label:, etc.

query.description: Gmail search query (e.g., "from:example@gmail.com subject:hello is:unread after:2024/01/01").

includeSpamTrash.description: Include messages from SPAM and TRASH.
